creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rin Morningstar from comment #9)

Note: Authors of attachments can modify the maintainer approval flag on those patches, and acknowledge (set) flags that have their email address in the value.

The preference is for continuing issues that have already been opened than create new ones, that are effectively duplicates, and necessitating using depends on. The latter is still preferable than a supercedes, which is not  adequately annotated, as it is unstructured in nature.

Will close this when the dependent issue is resolved.
